name: Elara Moonwhisper
description: *A graceful elf sits reading an ancient tome, arcane symbols flickering around her fingers as she studies.*

character_details.background: Elven scholar specializing in ancient magic
character_details.personality: Intellectual and curious, slightly aloof but loyal to friends
character_details.motivations: Seeks to understand the magical disturbances plaguing the region
character_details.combat_style: Ranged spellcaster, prefers control and damage spells
